summary: Tranzila Payment Gateway Integration - All 12 backend API tests passed. Verified: auth login, exchange rate, payment token generation, payment details with Tranzila config, handshake (USD/ILS), payment status, payment simulation flow, and error handling for invalid tokens.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns access token
GET /api/exchange-rate - Returns USD to ILS rate (live or fallback)
POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/payment-token - Generates payment token and URL
GET /api/payment/{token} - Returns job details with has_tranzila: true, tranzila_terminal: grsil
POST /api/payment/{token}/handshake (USD) - Returns thtk token from Tranzila, supplier=grsil, currency_code=2
POST /api/payment/{token}/handshake (ILS) - Returns converted ILS amount using exchange_rate, currency_code=1
GET /api/payment/{token}/status - Returns pending/paid status with transaction details
POST /api/payment/{token}/simulate - Full flow: pending -> simulate -> paid -> already_paid
critical_code_review_comments: Tranzila handshake correctly calls real API at https://api.tranzila.com/v1/handshake/create
Payment flow properly stores handshake data (thtk, amount, currency) on job for audit
Currency conversion correctly applies exchange_rate for ILS payments
Notify endpoint handles both form-encoded and JSON POST from Tranzila
Simulate endpoint creates TEST- prefixed transaction IDs for easy identification
seed_data_creation: Created test jobs during simulation tests (not cleaned up as DELETE not allowed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tranzila payment gateway integration fully tested. All payment endpoints working: token generation, payment details, handshake (USD/ILS), status check, simulate. Real Tranzila API is called for handshake (terminal: grsil). Frontend payment page at /pay?token={token} not tested in this iteration (backend only). Exchange rate API returns live rate from exchangerate-api.com with 3.65 fallback.
